copy.description:
Brookline Select Board Meeting - March 24, 2026

At the Brookline Select Board meeting on March 24, 2026, various topics were discussed, including community contributions to local heritage and the importance of maintaining educational programs. A proclamation for Transgender Day of Visibility was read, emphasizing community support and visibility for this cause [69:48]. Financial discussions centered around the school budget, with concerns about maintaining services and the impact of a potential override on taxpayers [120:10][122:19].
